# SEA — Search / long-tail demand

Genus: **Quaeribilitas**

Whether the video can be found and remain useful over time.

| ID | Scientific-style name | Area | Hypothesis | Metric | Method |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| H001 | *Quaeribilitas quaesitiva* var. h001-topic-beats-broad | A. Classification and search | Specific topic beats broad topic. | SAV | M-SGA |
| H002 | *Quaeribilitas captionis* var. h002-keyword-alignment-across | A. Classification and search | Keyword alignment across speech, caption, overlay, and title improves discovery. | SEA | M-SGA |
| H003 | *Quaeribilitas quaesitiva* var. h003-narrow-audience-callout | A. Classification and search | Narrow audience callout improves first retention. | EHR | M-SGA |
| H004 | *Quaeribilitas quaesitiva* var. h004-search-backed-topics | A. Classification and search | Search-backed topics create longer tails than trend-backed topics. | SEA | M-SGA |
| H005 | *Quaeribilitas quaesitiva* var. h005-should-searchable-promise | A. Classification and search | One video should have one searchable promise. | RET | M-SGA |
| H030 | *Quaeribilitas captionis* var. h030-keyword-text-improves | D. Captions and text overlays | Keyword text in first 2s improves classification. | SEA | M-SGA |
| H095 | *Quaeribilitas captionis* var. h095-search-style-titles | Information scent | Search-style titles and captions produce longer-tail traffic than clever but vague captions. | SEA | M-SGA |
| H096 | *Quaeribilitas textualis* var. h096-frame-keyword-label | Information scent | A first-frame keyword label improves cold-audience classification when the visual alone is ambiguous. | EHR | M-SGA |
| H116 | *Quaeribilitas quaesitiva* var. h116-repeated-topic-language | Niche-setting | Repeated topic language across videos improves search and recommendation coherence. | SEA | M-SGA |
| H160 | *Quaeribilitas quaesitiva* var. h160-search-should-open | Search vs feed | Search-first videos should open with the exact problem and solution. | SEA | M-SGA |
| H161 | *Quaeribilitas quaesitiva* var. h161-feed-should-open | Search vs feed | Feed-first videos should open with contrast, tension, or result. | CTV | M-SGA |
| H310 | *Quaeribilitas captionis* var. h310-search-traffic-grows | Search long-tail | Search traffic grows when the exact query appears in title/caption and first spoken line. | SEA | M-SGA |
| H311 | *Quaeribilitas quaesitiva* var. h311-search-decay-slower | Search long-tail | Search videos decay slower than trend videos if they solve a persistent problem. | SEA | M-SGA |
| H312 | *Quaeribilitas textualis* var. h312-hybrid-search-feed | Search long-tail | Hybrid search/feed opens are strongest when they show a result visually and name the query textually. | SEA | M-SGA |
| H318 | *Quaeribilitas primafacialis* var. h318-frame-should-designed | First frame | A first frame should be designed after choosing the primary action: save, send, comment, follow or search. | SAV | M-SGA |
| H352 | *Quaeribilitas quaesitiva* var. h352-comment-prompts-should | Comment system | Comment prompts should collect usable research variables, not empty engagement. | CMT | M-SGA |
| H377 | *Quaeribilitas textualis* var. h377-neighbourhood-context-clips | Real estate / property | Neighbourhood/context clips generate more saves than pure listing tours for buyers researching later. | SAV | M-SGA |
| H390 | *Quaeribilitas quaesitiva* var. h390-patch-meta-commentary | Gaming | Patch/meta commentary gets search long-tail when the exact game/version is in title and first line. | CMT | M-SGA |
| H409 | *Quaeribilitas quaesitiva* var. h409-metrics-reveal-packaging | Time windows | 24h metrics reveal packaging and early audience fit; 7d/30d metrics reveal search and durable value. | EHR | M-SGA |
| H411 | *Quaeribilitas quaesitiva* var. h411-wins-dies-should | Time windows | A video that wins 24h but dies by 7d should be treated as trend/emotion-led unless it also gains search traffic. | SEA | M-SGA |
